stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA reported Q1 2026 earnings on April 22, beating estimates with 120% YoY revenue growth driven by AI GPU demand. Economic implications include accelerated AI adoption boosting tech sector. Market psychology: FOMO buying in AI leaders. Historical parallel: Dot-com boom where chipmakers surged. Analogies: 1) Like oil during energy crisis, AI chips are the new gold. 2) Rocket fuel for tech indices.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches show headlines like 'NVDA crushes earnings' on CNBC, WSJ. X posts (20 latest) 85% positive sentiment with #NVDAtoMoon trending, high engagement on AI growth.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long NVDA for 10-15% gains in 1 week on momentum.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid short; high short squeeze risk.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Overvaluation bubble burst, competition from AMD.

stocks.justification: Strong earnings data, uniform positive sentiment across news and X.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla delayed robotaxi unveil to October 2026 per April 22 announcement, citing regulatory hurdles. Implications: Slows autonomous driving monetization, pressures valuation. Psychology: Disappointment selling. Parallel: 2020 battery day hype fade. Analogies: 1) Promised land delayed like vaporware software. 2) Car with flat tire on highway.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: News: Bloomberg 'TSLA robotaxi delay hits stock'. X semantic search shows 70% negative posts, memes mocking Elon.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Dip buy for 5% rebound if support holds.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Elon tweet reversal, China sales surprise.

stocks.justification: Clear negative news, but TSLA volatility tempers certainty.

stocks.impact_theory: Apple antitrust trial update on April 22 ruled against App Store changes, potential $ billions fine. Implications: Margin squeeze on services. Psychology: Fear of regulation spread. Parallel: EU fines on Google. Analogies: 1) Taxman knocking at profitable door. 2) Golden goose clipped wings.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: WSJ coverage heavy, X keyword search reveals #AAPLdoomed with lawyer quotes viral.

stocks.justification: Regulatory news solid, but appeals possible.

stocks.impact_theory: Amazon AWS announced major AI infrastructure expansion April 22, partnerships with Anthropic. Implications: Cloud dominance strengthens. Psychology: Re-rating higher. Parallel: 2023 AWS rebound. Analogies: 1) Building bigger cloud castle. 2) Fueling the AI engine room.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: CNBC positive, X posts bullish on #AWSAI.

stocks.justification: Strategic AI move aligns with trends.

stocks.impact_theory: Meta Q1 earnings April 22 showed ad revenue beat, but metaverse losses widened. Implications: Core biz strong, moonshot drags. Psychology: Mixed, focus on AI ads. Parallel: Early Amazon losses. Analogies: 1) Profitable body with experimental limb. 2) Racing car with heavy backpack.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Mixed news but ad strength wins; X sentiment 60% positive.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short metaverse narrative for limited downside.
